description: SecretSync (GKE Integrated Secret Synchronization) materialises a Kubernetes Secret, named after this resource, from files a same-namespace SecretProviderClass exposes. Hand-written from https://docs.cloud.google.com/secret-manager/docs/sync-k8-secrets -- the CRD is GKE-managed with no public YAML; refresh from `kubectl get crd secretsyncs.secret-sync.gke.io -o yaml` on a live cluster when the feature updates.

serviceAccountName.description: The KSA whose Workload Identity principal reads the referenced Secret Manager secrets (roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor).

secretProviderClassName.description: Same-namespace SecretProviderClass listing the Secret Manager secrets and the file paths they surface as.

sourcePath.description: File path exposed by the SecretProviderClass.

targetKey.description: Key in the materialised Kubernetes Secret.
